name: Benchy Award
description: Resin trophy of classic 3D Benchy boat for your first calibration print.

name: Motor Award
description: 12 cm tall brushed aluminum trophy shaped like an Edison Model M motor; awarded to early buyers.

name: Rocket Award
description: 15 cm tall brushed aluminum rocket trophy awarded for printing your first model rocket.

name: Rocketeer Award
description: 12 cm aluminum rocket trophy for your first model rocket launch.

name: Completionist Award
description: 15 cm aluminum trophy etched 'Completionist 2023'; reward for finishing every quest on 2023-01-01.

name: Tree Hugger Award
description: 12 cm bamboo trophy laser-engraved with a tree; awarded for converting dCarbon to dOffset.

name: Completionist Award II core
description: Freshly printed PLA core of the Completionist Award II, ready for sanding and a press-fit nameplate.

name: Completionist Award II nameplate
description: Engraved PLA plate with the award date and serial, sized to seat flush in the trophy core.

name: Completionist Award II (polished)
description: Award wiped clean of dust and fingerprints, ready for display photos.

name: Completionist Award II (displayed)
description: Award staged on a dusted shelf with backlighting logged for future inspections.

name: Completionist Award II
description: 12 cm PLA trophy dated 2023-06-30; printed core and nameplate bonded for finishing and display.

name: Hydro Award
description: 10 cm aluminum droplet trophy engraved 'Hydration Hero'; reward for hauling ten buckets to dChat.

name: V2 Upgrade Trophy
description: Awarded for migrating a v2 localStorage save to the v3 IndexedDB format.

name: GitHub Link-Up Trophy
description: A celebratory Octocat badge awarded for securely connecting GitHub and enabling cloud sync.

name: Test Suite Triumph Trophy
description: Anodized aluminum trophy for a clean, tested-and-verified CI-parity run.

name: Completionist Award III structural kit
description: Set of printed lattice ribs, spacer collars, and engraved accent plates that form the polymer skeleton of Completionist Award III.

name: Completionist Award III wood base
description: Sanded and sealed pine base with cable channels, board standoffs, and a recessed pocket for the planter module.

name: Completionist Award III control board
description: Hand-soldered Arduino-driven indicator board with resistor-limited LEDs and test points for power and moisture diagnostics.

name: Completionist Award III sealed harness
description: Color-labeled jumper harness with soldered splices and heat-shrink insulation, validated for continuity and strain relief.

name: Completionist Award III planter module
description: Micro-planter insert with hydrated starter plug and diluted nutrient charge, ready to sit in the trophy crown.

name: Completionist Award III integrated assembly
description: Mechanically assembled trophy stack with mounted printed structure, wood base, control board, and planter cradle awaiting debug sign-off.

name: Completionist Award III validated assembly
description: Integrated assembly that passed power-on checks, LED diagnostics, harness tug tests, and moisture-shield verification.

name: Completionist Award III
description: Hero-shot concept for image generation: a 28 cm mixed-media trophy with a matte walnut-stained stepped wood base, brushed aluminum corner guards, and a helical white-PLA lattice rising around a central illuminated spine. The spine contains a visible microcontroller board with amber status LEDs, neatly heat-shrunk black wiring, and tiny etched labels for fabrication, energy, robotics, and software milestones. At the top sits a living micro-planter crown: a geometric planter ring holding a bright green starter plug and fresh sprouts under a compact halo grow light. Front face includes an engraved plate reading 'Completionist Award III — Metaguild Frontier', subtle orbital star-map linework, and miniature tool motifs (nozzle, soldering tip, chisel, leaf, rocket fin). Color palette: warm walnut, satin silver metal, white polymer, black cabling, and vivid plant greens. Lighting style: soft studio rim light with gentle bloom from LEDs and top grow ring, crisp depth of field, realistic manufacturing textures, no background clutter.
